rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component implementation scopes for implementation-level signal routing bindings.
Use component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that refer to component ports.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be placed in valid AADL scopes: component types for assumptions/guarantees, implementations for bindings.
Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Ensure AGREE variable types match AADL port types; avoid type mismatches in expressions.
Avoid encoding AADL properties like timing or unit tokens as AGREE variables.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Use visible identifiers from the AADL model for AGREE expressions.
Do not use opaque Boolean data in numeric comparisons; prefer exact Boolean expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level signal routing bindings in component type annexes.
Do not reference AADL property names (e.g., Deadline, Period) as AGREE variables.
